policy.instagramFirst: Treat official Instagram profiles as the first freshness signal for gyms. Official websites remain baseline/cross-check sources.
policy.calendarRule: Multi-day events are marked only on the start date; the full period belongs on the detail page.
policy.closureRule: Mark closed only with an official closure notice, or with two independent current sources when the official source is unavailable. Partial evidence stays published and queued.
